extra.reason: Documented and checked the incubated DeviseHx release lane: package/generator bridge contract, CI/runtime gates, security escapes, changelog note, and standalone split criteria. Verified release contracts plus DeviseHx/package/adoption smoke gates.

Reusable DeviseHx companion layer is decomposed and implemented through the completed child beads: design review/docs, core typed package, deterministic extractor/adoption generator, routes, controller/current-user typing, model/schema validation, HHX helpers, sanitizer/mailer/test seams, dogfood app, and the incubated package/release lane.

All gradual-adoption child work is complete: schema adoption, migration-history reports, generator-assisted gem-layer adoption, and reusable DeviseHx companion layer/release lane. Existing docs and smoke/runtime gates cover mixed Ruby/ERB/Haxe interop, generated contracts, fail-closed behavior, and migration paths.
